title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - IR-4
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: IR-4 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control IR-4 in the Incident Response family. The control title for IR-4 is Incident Handling. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: AT-2 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, AT-2, belongs to the Awareness and Training family and is titled Literacy Training and Awareness. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
